prompt_text:
### Demographics: 49-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.3 kg; Height 150.6 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.0%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 246mg/dL; 9 months ago 254mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 276mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 75.9kg; 6 months ago 76.9kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 77.3kg), Height (12 months ago 150.6cm; 9 months ago 150.6cm; 6 months ago 150.6cm; 3 months ago 150.6cm; current 150.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 37U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 242mg/g; 9 months ago 264mg/g; 6 months ago 199mg/g; 3 months ago 217mg/g; current 269mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 102mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 139mg/dL; current 149mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.01 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
